name: New Relic Infrastructure
description: New Relic Infrastructure agent for host and container monitoring. Reports system metrics, process data, and Docker container telemetry to New Relic.

paths.name: Host Root
paths.description: Read-only bind of the host root filesystem. Required for host-level metric collection.

paths.name: Docker Socket
paths.description: Docker socket for container discovery and monitoring.

paths.name: Config
paths.description: New Relic Infrastructure agent configuration directory.

variables.name: License Key
variables.description: New Relic license key. Found under Account Settings in the New Relic UI.
